content:
在此前日志 https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1402967510415839262 中给大家分享过未来排行减负的大致计划。

其中重要调整之一就是使排行榜的结算周期从每日变成每周，并且降低其中星辰篇天赋材料的负担。这样做虽然能够解决周期负担的压力问题，但也会导致参与这些玩法的奖励动机变弱。为了弥补这一点，我们将完全重做并升级幻梦深潜与相位对弈的生涯奖励。

新的幻梦深潜、相位对弈奖励目标既包括一次性最高记录、也包括特殊通关目标、还包括该玩法模式下的经验值和等级奖励。我们的目标是在排行奖励与生涯奖励调整后，大家仍然有持续可游玩的目标，但与以往不同的是，你可以安排自己的时间节奏，慢慢来。

因此当 V2.4 更新后，旧版生涯奖励将无法再获取，请需要的守密人把握最后的机会。我们也会在 V2.3.4 的更新中为这些旧奖励加上结束倒计时来更好的提醒大家。

In the previous log https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1402967510415839262, I shared the general plan for reducing the burden of future rankings.

One of the important adjustments is to change the settlement period of the leaderboard from daily to weekly, while also reducing the burden of the Astral Reign talent materials. Although this can alleviate the pressure of the periodic burden, it may also weaken the incentive to participate in these gameplay modes. To compensate for this, we will completely redo and upgrade the career rewards for Phantasmal Dive and Traphase.

The new rewards targets for Phantasmal Dive and Traphase include not only one-time high scores but also special completion objectives, as well as experience points and level rewards within these gameplay modes. Our goal is to ensure that, after adjustments to ranking rewards and career rewards, everyone still has ongoing playable objectives. However, unlike before, you can set your own pace and take your time.

Therefore, after the V2.4 update, the old career rewards will no longer be available. Keepers in need should seize the last opportunity. We will also add a countdown timer for these old rewards in the V2.3.4 update to better remind everyone.
thread_title: 前瞻：V2.4 幻梦深潜与相位对弈生涯奖励重做 Preview: V2.4 Phantasmal Dive and Traphase Career Rewards Rework
